find_remnant.title: Locate an Ancient Remnant (L Ender's Cataclysm — spawns as a world structure or boss arena)

remnant.title: Defeat the Ancient Remnant (Cataclysm — pre-Maledictus boss)

subtitle.text: It is not the hardest thing Cataclysm adds. It is the first.

description: L Ender's Cataclysm adds a boss chain:
Ancient Remnant → Maledictus → Annihilator + Ignis → Emulator
The Ancient Remnant is the entry point.
It must be defeated before Maledictus becomes available.
Maledictus drops Cursium — the key ingredient for the deeper chain.
The Cataclysm chain spans Ch09, Ch11, and Ch13.
The Ancient Remnant is the first step of that long path.
The Black Eye from the Desert civilization is one inheritance.
The Cataclysm chain is the pathway to the Magical Eye — another.
Both paths converge at the portal.
